text:
INT. ABANDONED WAREHOUSE - NIGHT

Rain drums against the rusted corrugated roof. ARJUN (40s, weary) stands in the shadows, his gun drawn but lowered.

RANA (50s, impeccably dressed) sits on a crate, lighting a cigar with steady hands.

RANA: You're late, Arjun. Even for a man who's lost everything.

ARJUN: I haven't lost the ability to pull a trigger, Rana.

EXT. RAIN-SOAKED TEMPLE STEPS - NIGHT

Lightning cracks across the sky. RAHUL (20s, heartbroken) falls to his knees. His shirt is soaked, clinging to him.

RAHUL: (Screaming at the sky) KYUN?! Why did you take her from me? Is this your justice?!

PRIYA (20s, ethereal) appears in the doorway, her eyes filled with tears.

EXT. CHERRY BLOSSOM PARK - DAY

Petals fall like snow. MIN-HO (25, shy) stands across from JI-SOO (24, smiling).

JI-SOO: You've been standing there for ten minutes. Are you waiting for the flowers to talk?

MIN-HO: (Looking down) I... I was waiting for my courage to catch up with me.

EXT. CRUMBLING CITYSCAPE - DAY

KENJI (17, determined) stares down the massive MECHA-SENTINEL. His eyes glow with a faint blue light.

KENJI: (Inner monologue) If I don't do this now, no one will. My ancestors... lend me your strength!

KENJI draws his blade, sparks flying as it scrapes against the concrete.
